新能源.title: Kia EV2 Long Range goes on sale with 281 miles of range, plus GT and Black-Line trims
新能源.summary: 281英里续航的起亚EV2长续航版上市，提供GT和Black-Line配置。

新能源.title: Xpeng’s new L03 undercuts Tesla Model Y by up to $10,000 in Europe
新能源.summary: 小鹏新款L03电动SUV在欧洲上市，售价比特斯拉Model Y低至1万美元。

新能源.title: Honda is officially pulling the plug on its only EV in the US
新能源.summary: 本田正式停止在美国市场销售其唯一的电动汽车。

新能源.title: Volvo delivers first EX60 EVs, a ‘game changer’ with 500+ miles range and fast charging

新能源.title: Chip Motors unveils $15,000 electric ‘life utility vehicle’

政策法规.title: America Lost Over 111,000 Jobs Due To Trump's Clean Energy Pullback
政策法规.summary: 特朗普政府撤销清洁能源激励措施，导致美国11.1万个工作岗位流失。

国际车企.title: Americans Can't Have These Affordable Chinese EVs. But They're Coming To Canada

国际车企.summary: 报道称沃尔沃考虑在2028年前将电动轿车和旅行车重新引入美国市场。
